testcase.name: test_login_password_user_no_2fa

failure.message: Failed: Login failed: 429 - {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."}

testcase.name: test_login_invalid_credentials
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_2fa.py:275: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 429 E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demo_login_procurement
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_2fa.py:300: in test_demo_login_procurement assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demo_login_site_engineer
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_2fa.py:311: in test_demo_login_site_engineer assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demo_profile_access
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_profile_2fa.py:323: in test_demo_profile_access assert login_response.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
